title: POV: You Finally Pass Your Funded Account… Then This Happens
description: POV: You grind for months to pass a funded account challenge — then blow it in one trade. Sound familiar? Here's the one thing the R2F Trading system checks before every single entry. This changed everything for traders in 2026. #ICTTrading #FundedTrader #OrderBlocks #SmartMoneyConcepts #R2FTrading
script: You just passed your funded account. Day one — you see a setup. You take it. Account blown in 4 hours. Here's what happened. You traded INTO an order block — not FROM one. Smart money was already out. You were the exit liquidity. The R2F Trading system uses one rule: never enter until price sweeps liquidity AND closes back inside a valid order block. That one filter stops 80% of bad trades. This weekend — backtest it. One setup. One rule. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every day at r2ftrading.com.
